creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
This bug continues to ba a major annoyance. Portmanager seems to hang
when it displays this message for an exorbitant amount of time. If I
rename the pkgtools.conf file the problem goes away, although I hesitate
to do that since it might break the portupgrade tool's suite.

Would it be possible to either fix this problem or disable the use of
pkgtools.conf from within portmanager?

-- 
Gerard Seibert
gerard@seibercom.net
